exception.message: There were issues with the specification. The option can be disabled via validateSpec (Maven/Gradle) or --skip-validate-spec (CLI). | Error count: 1, Warning count: 0 Errors: -Cannot invoke "io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema.get$ref()" because "property" is null
